story.text:
# Axis · compute

**intelligence / learning** · zk-dimension *learning*

Lattice basis vertex **2** (bit 1) — see [[Axioms]] A1.
One of the six roots; it grows a heptad of seven stations that fold into the territory.

## The heptad (fill order → keystone last)

| # | station | role | class | persona |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | head | lead advisor | vision fish | 🤖 Architect |
| 2 | head-heart | visionary advisor | vision fish | 🧭 Topologist |
| 3 | head-hands | strategist maker | vision fish | 🔷 Holonic-Architect |
| 4 | hands | lead builder | mouse | 🔨 Forgemaster |
| 5 | heart-hands | caring builder | mouse | ☰ Forgecaller |
| 6 | heart | steward builder | mouse | ⚛️ Quantum Sentinel |
| 7 | head-heart-hands | keystone guide | privacy guide | 🐉 Dragonwaker |
See the whole roster: [[Personas]] · the stations: [[Stations]]

---
[[Welcome]] · the Game of 42 — six axes × seven stations = 42
